# Metrodorus

*331 BCE – 278 BCE · Greek · [Epicureanism](../movements/epicureanism.md)*

The closest disciple of [Epicurus](../philosophers/epicurus.md) and the second master of the [Garden](../movements/epicureanism.md).

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
